Print lifecycle/status summary report

Usage: registry-consumer status-report [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --show-ids         Include sorted feature ids per status
      --json             Emit machine-readable JSON report rows
      --compact          Single-line compact JSON array of report rows (mutually exclusive with --json)
      --nonzero-only     Omit statuses with zero counts
      --status <STATUS>  Filter report to one lifecycle status [possible values: draft, active, superseded, retired]
  -h, --help             Print help
